name: Autopass
description: Provider of a cloud-based fintech SaaS (Software as a service) platform designed to offer end-to-end solutions for operators such as parking lots, gas stations, and charging spots. The company's platform integrates license plate recognition technology (LPR) to provide cashless payment options in all roadside parking spaces to build a broader ecosystem, thereby enabling drivers to complete transactions quickly and efficiently without the need to get out of their cars.

name: Bayapay Sdn Bhd
description: Provider of a smart fuel fleet payment & fleet management platform intended to help commercial vehicle owners deter fraud, save cost, and digitize fleet management. The company offers a fully functional open-loop payment card to save money and stay ahead of the competition, enabling businesses to make secure payments within set limits and controls across all fleet-related expenses with ease.

name: Pupot
description: Developer of an online gift card platform designed to offer a range of top-ups and mobile recharges. The company's platform offers bill payments, digital gift cards, mobile refills, and networking services from various vendors that can be bought using Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies, enabling people to live on cryptocurrency as easily as possible, with no bank or exchange account required.

name: Bonpara
description: Developer of a digital platform designed to launch online stores. The company's platform offers a variety of tools and integrations, such as payment gateways, shipping carriers, and marketing and analytics tools, enabling businesses to get a convenient and cost-effective way to set up and manage their online stores and increase their sales.

name: Bridg Payment Solutions
description: Developer of a payment application designed to make payments without any data plans. The company's application facilitates a transaction to occur between multiple devices even if the phones have a connection to the internet utilizing Bluetooth technology, enabling users to make easy, safe, and wireless payments that have a larger reach with complete user control.

name: Cheddar Up
description: Developer of an online payment platform designed to collect and track online group payments. The company's platform offers services including online payment tracking, automatic reminders, no fees for the collector, and custom form fields services, besides providing a user interface that makes collecting online payments accessible to anyone, enabling users to create custom online payment pages for almost anything and save time and focus on more important activities.

name: Chipper Cash
description: Operator of a money transfer platform intended to provide free and instant peer-to-peer cross-border money payments. The company's platform provides a fee-free transfer frictionless way to send and receive money for personal payments through financial inclusivity across the continent, enabling users to make payments efficiently via mobile application.

name: EdfaPay
description: Developer of a financial platform designed to provide smart and efficient payment services. The company offers mobile software that specializes in executing financial transactions efficiently in the short possible time, least effort & cost, and allows merchants to provide all payment methods for their customers using an NFC system, enabling businesses to collect customer payments through smartphones and completely forgo traditional POS systems.

name: Epoint
description: Developer of an online payment platform designed to offer businesses a secure way to accept payments. The company offers downloadable financial reports, logs of all transactions, a multilingual interface, a free business website, API connection, payouts to any business cards, multi-access, split payments, QR and invoice payment, and recurring payments, enabling businesses to connect online payments for their website.

name: ExCo
description: Provider of an online payment platform and loan service designed to give consumers peace of mind and increase conversion and sales. The company's platform offers to make cardless e-commerce payments and helps in peer-to-peer lending, enabling consumers to boost conversion and live profitably.

name: EasyPay
description: Developer of an online invoicing platform intended to help freelancers and micro and small businesses with online payments. The company's platform offers its users to add their customers, create and deliver tailored invoices, and simplifies the payment process for both parties, enabling clients to start their business online and collect payments through different payment methods.

name: Fidel
description: Developer of a financial infrastructure platform intended to link payment cards with mobile and website applications. The company's platform integrates directly with various payment cards such as Visa or Mastercard to get granular transaction data, including amount, location, date and merchant in real-time thus utilizing consumers' financial data for improved marketing and customer engagement, enabling clients to monitor and reward customers based on actual spending.

name: Flex
description: Developer of a spend management platform designed to help small and medium-sized enterprises to manage and track expenses. The company's platform provides an intuitive user interface, insights, digital requisitions, bulk payment transfers, budgeting, and expense tracking, enabling businesses to digitize their daily operations.

name: FT Cash
description: Developer of a mobile payments platform designed to empower micro-merchants and SMEs through financial inclusion using digital payments and loans. The company's platform features the ability to accept payments through multiple payment instruments including debit cards, credit cards, and mobile wallets, enabling merchants to accept electronic payments without any additional hardware or POS device.

name: Gas POS
description: Developer of an EMV-compliant point-of-sale system designed to assist with the transition to EMV upgrades at the pump. The company's system provides payment security and point-to-point encryption to protect from fraud, hacking and fines, enabling gas station owners to avail fuel control and fleet card acceptance by upgrading to EMV-chip reading pumps and running fuel business conveniently with reduced frauds and costs.

name: Gigstack
description: Developer of a financial platform designed to manage the expenses and income of the businesses. The company's platform offers payment, billing options, a self-billing portal, monitoring, and stamping invoices, helping professionals, startups, and small and medium enterprises with a simplified application programming interface that is enough to create an invoice, a payment link, or a sales receipt.

name: Hamsa
description: Developer of a cross-border payment platform designed to combine the existing financial system with blockchain technology. The company's platform features a global checkout portal that is built specifically for B2B e-commerce, a dedicated control center for all transactions and can be integrated with various accounting software, enabling businesses to process multi-currency transfers more efficiently.

name: OEN
description: Developer of a unified payment platform designed for nonprofits, campaigns, and organizations. The company's platform features include payments, fundraising, engagement, and compliance such as donations, e-commerce, ticketing, and subscriptions, easily setting up hosted fundraising websites and customizing call-to-actions, gaining insights into the target audience, and creating meaningful engagement based on the dynamic supporter database, enabling organizations to abide local laws and regulations.

name: Pellego
description: Flat fee firm focused on the 2.5m real estate agents who use their license part time. Beachhead market of real estate investors with an agent license. Growing at 100% per year (3 years in a row) with 13x LTV:CAC and $1m ARR.

name: PointCheckout
description: Developer of an online payment gateway platform for small businesses focused on allowing non-eCommerce businesses to get paid remotely. The company's platform allows merchants to accept payment using payment links, an online e-commerce store, API integrations, and many more, clients can also pay using debit, credit, digital wallets, cryptocurrency, and loyalty points, enabling users to use their reward points and redeem them for online shopping and helping SMEs with safe and fast payments.

name: PostEx
description: Developer of fintech and logistics platform designed to offer cash on delivery and online payment options to online retailers. The company's platform features payment acceptance solutions from customers and an upfront payment collection for all cash-on-delivery orders. enabling businesses to monitor the status of their deliveries, retailers to track the shipment of the dispatched products, and accept payments.

name: Presto
description: Presto Automation Inc overlays next-gen digital solutions onto the physical world. It provides an accurate, next-gen solution that uses artificial intelligence to automate speech recognition for restaurant drive-thru. The Company earns substantially all of its revenue in the United States.

name: Produce Pay
description: Developer of a financing and trading platform designed to facilitate a sustainable way to provide the agricultural industry with financial resources. The company's platforms provide farmers with immediate access to liquidity and financing in addition to real-time data for pricing transparency and connections to other key players in the field, enabling farmers to access custom-made cash flow services and expand their businesses.

name: Qwikwire
description: Developer of an online international payment platform designed to manage property payments, association dues and others, invoicing and billing with an automated dashboard. The company's platform provides white-labeled invoicing and payment service to large enterprises for billing customers who are out of state or those who are temporarily working abroad which reduces reliance on intermediaries such as agents, brokers, or other marketing channels, enabling businesses to easily monitor all their transactions in real-time.

name: Remitbee
description: Developer of a financial platform designed for cross-currency money transfer transactions. The company's money transfer platform offers a user-friendly service in which customers can send money online using their web browsers, tablets and mobile phones, enabling users to easily send money straight from their bank accounts and cash accounts worldwide.

name: Sanad Cash
description: Developer of an all-in-one spending management platform intended to track all spending from one single dashboard. The company's platform tracks all business transactions with instant corporate card issuing to control spending and instantly issue multi-currencies corporate cards for employees, enabling startups, small and medium enterprises and corporates to reduce fraud and save time collecting expense receipts.

name: ShipCash
description: Developer of a digital platform designed to help e-commerce sellers receive payments instantly for cash on delivery orders. The company's platform specializes in integrating directly with shipping companies' systems to provide seamless, efficient and cost-effective cash payment and collection options for small and medium vendors shipping across the region, enabling clients with the simplified, easy and quick process to receive payments.

name: Simplifi/Simplifipay
description: SimpliFi is on a mission to democratize payments by building the leading Cards as a Service (CaaS) platform for MENA and Pakistan. We empower brands to unlock the power of financial ownership by enabling them to issue payment cards to streamline business operations and drive new revenue streams.

name: Stitch
description: Operator of a financial API platform intended to securely link bank accounts with a lightweight single sign-on experience. The company's platform connects directly to the existing infrastructure of banks for seamless integration with compliance, enabling clients to have a seamless user experience, one-click, fraud-free bank payments and easy access to financial data.

name: T2P
description: Developer of an e-wallet and payment gateway platform designed to facilitate electronic payment. The company's platform features a prepaid digital wallet with reward points and card services usable in online transactions and offline stores, enabling users to transfer money and pay bills in a simplified way.

name: Text'nPayMe
description: Developer of a payment application designed to turn any text or voice command to make payments. The company's application offers a convenient way to make payments across any digital platform through a payment interface, enabling users to get hassle-free transaction services.

name: Unisub LLC
description: Developer of recurring crypto payment platform designed to allow people to avail subscriptions through crypto. The company's platform integrates crypto subscriptions, that make payments automatic, so customers don't have to make a payment or manually enter their payment information, enabling businesses to accept recurring crypto payments.

name: Xfers
description: Operator of a payment processing platform intended to offer credit card processing and internet banking transfers. The company's platform leverages technology to offer secured payment technology to automate bank transfer payments, enabling users to pay, receive and manage online payments.

name: Gyft
description: Developer of a digital gift card wallet application. The company offers a platform for managing digital gift cards from mobile phones by allowing its users to upload, buy and redeem gift cards in stores or online.

name: Pokkt
description: Provider of a mobile video advertising platform intended to serve the application developers and publishers. The company's platform offers to make free purchases through multiple alternative monetization tools such as watching videos, subscribing to services, installing applications and participation in surveys, enabling clients to get connected with the right audiences.

name: Payment24
description: Provider of a fuel payment and fleet management system created for fleet management. The company's fleet management system integrates into gas stations and vehicles, enabling fleet owners and managers to reduce fraud and increase efficiencies.

name: ShopGo
description: Provider of software platform designed to create e-commerce Websites. The company's software platform provides local support to its merchants and their changing needs at every stage, enabling merchants to succeed in their online business.

name: WePay
description: Provider of an online payment platform designed to accept and process instant payments. The company's online payment platform delivers payments-as-a-service APIs for simple onboarding and activation of payments, without impacting the user experience, enabling enterprises to process instant onboarding and payments without friction or fraud.

name: Papaya
description: Provider of an online platform to sell movie tickets. The company offers a mobile application to sell tickets, while aggregating movie-related content and providing showtime information through its network of sites.

name: Kudo
description: Provider of an online platform designed to help businesses to create opportunities to grow their current business through technology. The company's online platform offers to make cash payments through a network of electronic machines to purchase e-commerce products without a credit card, as well as transportation tickets, enabling users to shop online with a safe payment gateway.

name: Curlec
description: Developer of a digital financial platform intended to facilitate the collection of recurring payments. The company's platform conducts transactions and gathers cash receipts by intermediating between buyers, sellers, and their banks, enabling businesses to avail secure process of administering bank-to-bank payments.

name: Flywire
description: Developer of an online payment platform designed to streamline the international and domestic payment experience. The company's platform fully reconciles global payments and offers scope for global refunding while keeping all parties updated throughout the process in education, healthcare and business transactions, enabling clients to get fast, secure and convenient payments collections from all over the world and different currencies.

name: Limbo Labs
description: Developer of a financial software to manage debt. The company has developed a financial software which allows its users to track their debt, make payments and monitor credit.

name: Giftcard Zen
description: Buyer and seller of gift cards from retailers online. The company buys gift cards from consumers and businesses and sells them to consumers and businesses at a discount of face value.

name: TransFS
description: Provider of an online marketplace for credit-card processors. The company provides a platform for merchants to shop and compare bids from multiple providers of credit-card processing services.

name: WayPay
description: Operator of a payments platform intended to simplify business payments. The company's platform connects any accounts payable system and automatically reconciles payments sent to local or international suppliers from any combination of bank and credit card accounts, enabling small and medium enterprises to easily, efficiently and cost effectively make payments for their business expenses.

name: ChangeTip
description: Developer of an application for making payments via social networks. The company's product ChangeTip integrates payment processing with social media which enables people to tip each other via social networks.

name: Omise
description: Operator of full-featured payment management platform designed to connect millions of customers across the world. The company's payment management platform is easy to setup and works seamlessly across multiple devices, providing fraud detection, data privacy and highly secured transactions, enabling users to manage their funds whenever they want.

name: Billplz
